title: What is going on with Misato
display_title: What is going on with Misato
wikitext:
[]: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by TrashAssUser » Mon Oct 22, 2018 4:16 am Remember Misato said that WILLE's sole task is to destroy all Evas? If so, why does she still own 2 Evas?

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 22, 2018 10:27 am Ever hear the expression "fight fire with fire"?

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 22, 2018 1:39 pm Correction: she says their task is to destroy all of NERV's Evas. This finally prompts Shinji to ask whether or not they are Nerv, and that is when Misato declares that they are part of Wille instead. Moving this thread to rebuild.

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by airman4 » Wed Oct 24, 2018 1:50 pm Wille's evas arent Nerv's evas for the most ? I mean, they basically stole them

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Oct 27, 2018 6:29 pm Think of NERV as Vichy France and Wille as Free France. As Free France conquered the Vichy (with the help of the allies), and materiel left behind became theirs and was used by them. Unit-02 was obviously theres to begin with, and I'd guess Unit-08 and the Wunder were taken from a NERV facility before it could be used against the rest of humanity. Wille most likely also has the backing of the UN considering they were the ones behind locking Unit-02 way in 2.0 and the massive rag-tag fleet they had in 3.0.

Article: What is going on with Misato
[]: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by TrashAssUser » Mon Oct 22, 2018 4:16 am Remember Misato said that WILLE's sole task is to destroy all Evas? If so, why does she still own 2 Evas?

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 22, 2018 10:27 am Ever hear the expression "fight fire with fire"?

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Oct 22, 2018 1:39 pm Correction: she says their task is to destroy all of NERV's Evas. This finally prompts Shinji to ask whether or not they are Nerv, and that is when Misato declares that they are part of Wille instead. Moving this thread to rebuild.

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by airman4 » Wed Oct 24, 2018 1:50 pm Wille's evas arent Nerv's evas for the most ? I mean, they basically stole them

[]: Re: What is going on with Misato?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Oct 27, 2018 6:29 pm Think of NERV as Vichy France and Wille as Free France. As Free France conquered the Vichy (with the help of the allies), and materiel left behind became theirs and was used by them. Unit-02 was obviously theres to begin with, and I'd guess Unit-08 and the Wunder were taken from a NERV facility before it could be used against the rest of humanity. Wille most likely also has the backing of the UN considering they were the ones behind locking Unit-02 way in 2.0 and the massive rag-tag fleet they had in 3.0.
